display.purpose: Hero headline only. One instance per page.

body.purpose: Section subtitles, card descriptions, form text. Max line length ~560px.

label.purpose: Section tags, form labels, contact labels. Uppercase, tracked.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Header on scroll. Barely visible — signals the header has lifted from page.

shadows.name: whatsapp
shadows.purpose: Floating WhatsApp button default. Colored shadow matches fill.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default for all state transitions (border-color, background-color, color, box-shadow).

motion.name: lift
motion.purpose: Card and button Y-axis lift on hover. Never applied to layout properties.

motion.name: pulse-ring
motion.purpose: WhatsApp notification dot pulse. Uses @keyframes pulse, infinite.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: About grid collapses to single column. Footer shifts to 2-col.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop nav hidden, hamburger shown. Section padding reduced to 60px.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Services grid goes single column. Differential and metric grids stay 2-col.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Workshop Blue fill. Used for primary conversion actions except WhatsApp.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; background: #0369A1; color: #FFFFFF; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #075985; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #0EA5E9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: WhatsApp Button
components.description: Primary conversion CTA. WhatsApp Green fill. Equal weight to the primary button — appears in hero and mobile nav.
components.css: .ds-btn-whatsapp { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; background: #25D366; color: #FFFFFF; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-whatsapp:hover { background: #128C7E; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08); } .ds-btn-whatsapp:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #0EA5E9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA on dark backgrounds only (hero section). Transparent fill, white border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; background: transparent; color: #FFFFFF; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5); border-radius: 8px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #0EA5E9; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Tag
components.description: Pill-shaped category label. Always appears above the section headline. Never interactive.
components.css: .ds-section-tag { display: inline-block; background: #DBEAFE; color: #0369A1; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 100px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Content card for service listings. Flat at rest, lifts and accents border on hover.
components.html:
Instalação

Instalação profissional de equipamentos de refrigeração para transporte, com garantia de serviço.
components.css: .ds-service-card { background: #F8FAFC; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; cursor: default; } .ds-service-card:hover { border-color: #0EA5E9; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-service-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; background: #DBEAFE; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-service-title { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #0F172A; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-service-desc { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #64748B; line-height: 1.7; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Text field. White fill, stroke border. Blue focus glow. Used in the contact form.
components.css: .ds-form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-label { display: block; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #334155; margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: normal; } .ds-form-control { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1.5px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #020617; background: #FFFFFF; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; appearance: none; } .ds-form-control:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0369A1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(3,105,161,.12); } .ds-form-control::placeholder { color: #CBD5E1; } .ds-form-control.error { border-color: #EF4444; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239,68,68,.1); }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Fixed top header. White background, bottom border. Links go Workshop Blue on hover.
components.html:
SerTec
InícioServiçosSobreContato
components.css: .ds-header { background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #E2E8F0; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-header.scrolled { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08); } .ds-header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 72px; padding: 0 20px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-logo { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #0F172A; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-nav a { padding: 8px 14px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #334155; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease, background 200ms ease; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: #0369A1; background: #F8FAFC; }

components.name: Floating WhatsApp
components.description: Persistent conversion trigger. Fixed bottom-right. Green shadow, animated notification dot.
components.css: .ds-wa-float { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #25D366; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 14px 20px; border-radius: 50px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(37,211,102,.4); cursor: pointer; border: none; text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-wa-float:hover { background: #128C7E; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(37,211,102,.45); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-wa-dot { position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px; width: 16px; height: 16px; background: #EF4444; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #FFFFFF; } .ds-wa-dot::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -3px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(239,68,68,.4); animation: ds-pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: .8; } 100% { transform: scale(2.2); opacity: 0; } }

narrative.overview:
SerTec looks like a business that has done ten thousand service calls. Not a startup, not a franchise — a local specialist with calluses. The design carries that credibility through directness: a dark navy hero that commands authority without apology, content sections that stay clean and scannable on a budget Android screen, and every scroll stop ending with a clear next action. Nothing exists for decoration; everything earns its place by moving the user toward a WhatsApp message.

The palette splits the site cleanly into two environments: the deep midnight navy of the hero and footer, where trust is established, and the white-to-off-white content body, where specifics are delivered. The accent blue is never ambient — it fires only on interactive elements so the eye always knows where to go next.

This system explicitly rejects generic HVAC SaaS templates with dark blue grids and abstract 'AI-powered' icons. It rejects overdone glassmorphism, animated hero videos, and the cold anonymity of national chains. The site should feel like the owner could walk in the door.
keyCharacteristics: Light-mode content sections (white/off-white), dark hero and footer for authority framing
Accent blue reserved for action — never used as a decorative background
Poppins at high weight contrast (400 body, 700–800 display) for clear hierarchy on small screens
Flat surfaces at rest; elevation appears only on hover as a reward for engagement
WhatsApp green is a peer to the primary blue — a second CTA color with equal weight
Touch targets never smaller than 44px; copy direct and never padded

rules.name: The Workshop Blue Rule
rules.body: Workshop Blue (#0369A1) appears only on interactive elements and their direct containers. Never as a section background, decorative stripe, or ambient fill. Rarity is what makes it scannable.

rules.name: The Dark-Light Split Rule
rules.body: Hero and footer are always Midnight Navy. Content sections are always white or off-white. Never mix: no dark content cards inside light sections, no white-background islands inside the dark hero.

rules.name: The Weight-Only Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: All type is Poppins. Hierarchy is established exclusively through weight and size — never through a secondary typeface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A card with a shadow at rest is a card that has already spent its elevation budget. Reserve shadows for interaction — the hover lift should feel like a response, not a default.

dos: Do alternate section backgrounds (Pure White / Off-White / Midnight Navy) to create page rhythm.
Do use Workshop Blue exclusively for interactive elements.
Do lead every section with a pill-shaped section tag, followed immediately by the headline.
Do include a WhatsApp or phone CTA within every major section.
Do keep body line length at or under max-width: 560px for section subtitles.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — all transitions and animations must be gated on this media query.
Do size all touch targets at 44px minimum.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The single backdrop-filter on the About metrics block is the entire budget.
Don't use dark blue grids, abstract tech icons, or 'AI-powered' marketing language.
Don't make the site feel like a national chain — cold, anonymous, corporate.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored decorative stripe.
Don't apply Workshop Blue to section backgrounds, decorative blocks, or ambient fills.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Transitions are limited to transform, box-shadow, border-color, background-color, and color.
Don't add shadow to cards at rest.
Don't use animated hero videos or parallax effects.
